author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.3.1
body: ## [5.3.1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.3.0...v5.3.1) (2018-09-26) ### Bug Fixes * **connector:** ensure canRefine is computed on the transformed items ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1568](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/pull/1568)) ([5e954e7](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/5e954e7)) * **toggle:** ensure facet is present ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1613](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1613)) ([6ffb2ae](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/6ffb2ae))
